name: hubroute
description: HubRoute PHP and SQLite parcel operations app

scripts.maintainer:deploy:site: npm run package:site && npm test && npx --yes vercel deploy --prod --cwd dist/hubroute-site
scripts.maintainer:deploy:demo: npm run sync:demo && npm test && npx --yes vercel deploy --prod --cwd vercel-demo
scripts.maintainer:deploy:demo:preview: npm run sync:demo && npm test && npx --yes vercel deploy --cwd vercel-demo
scripts.test: npm run test:domain && npm run check:tokens && npm run check:demo && npm run smoke:demo
